milestones.title: Foundation
milestones.requirement: Fork the MultiShopping sample into a flower-shop app: re-skin to flower products, keep the adaptive Home/List/Detail/Mine pages navigable, and make it build and launch on the emulator.

acceptance.text: app builds and launches on the emulator; base pages navigable

milestones.title: Browse
milestones.requirement: On the home page show a scrollable list of flower products (image, name, price) with placeholder images; support pull-to-refresh with a loading indicator that falls back to local cached data on network failure; show a recently-viewed history of the last 10 products that survives an app restart.

acceptance.text: product list displays
pull-refresh works with loading indicator
network failure shows local cached data
image placeholder shows while loading
browse-history area shows recently viewed products

milestones.title: Detail+services
milestones.requirement: Build the product detail page (image, price, description); a favorite toggle that persists across app restart; a Buy button that sends a system order-confirmation notification; and clickable service entries for delivery-calendar, share, add-recipient, and photo-pick review.

acceptance.text: image, price, description display
favorite toggles and persists across restart
Buy sends a system notification
calendar/share/recipient/photo entries are clickable

milestones.title: Scan+voice
milestones.requirement: Add a scan-to-buy entry that opens the camera, scans a product QR code, and navigates to its detail page; and a voice-search entry that records a spoken product name and searches for it.

acceptance.text: scan entry opens the camera
scanning a product QR navigates to its detail page
voice entry records a name and searches

milestones.title: Location+map
milestones.requirement: Add a locate button that requests location permission on first use and shows the current coordinates; and a map entry that opens a store-map page showing nearby store markers.

acceptance.text: locate shows a permission prompt on first use
after grant, current coordinates display
map entry opens the store-map page with markers

milestones.title: Pay-security
milestones.requirement: Build a pay-security page where the user can set a 6-digit payment password (encrypted at rest), which stays valid after an app restart, and can be cleared; plus a biometric authentication entry.

acceptance.text: can set a 6-digit payment password
password stays valid after app restart
can clear the password
biometric authentication can be initiated (device only)

milestones.title: Account+services
milestones.requirement: On the Mine page show a Huawei-account login entry that opens the authorization page when tapped; and make the share, add-to-contacts, and bluetooth smart-vase status features work.

acceptance.text: Mine page shows a Huawei login entry
tapping login opens the authorization page
share, contacts, and bluetooth status features work
